creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
multimedia/cheese builds fine on armv6 and aarch64 (and probably ppc and armv7)
Why the CHEESE option is restricted to amd64 and i386?

http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-arm64-default/p487333_s342022/logs/errors/gnome-control-center-3.28.2_2.log

Dependency cheese found: NO (tried pkgconfig)
meson.build:149:2: ERROR:  Dependency "cheese" not found, tried pkgconfig
